speaker: speaker1
text: Can you help me do an internet search ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Sure . What do you want to find ?

speaker: speaker1
text: I want to find information on the American Civil War .

speaker: speaker2
text: Well , can you be more specific ? There are a lot of websites about that .

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , I want to know about the battle of Gettysburg .

speaker: speaker2
text: O . K . Well , go to google.com , and type in “ Battle of Gettysburg . ”

speaker: speaker1
text: Oh wow , there are a lot of sites .

speaker: speaker2
text: Here , try this one . It ’ s a good site about Gettysburg .

speaker: speaker2
text: For detailed information , however , you should read a history book .

speaker: speaker1
text: Thanks . If I ’ m interested , I ’ ll go to the library .
